rationale: Diff contains only execution-evidence JSON files; no code changes for any of the 14 AC items (runtime hooks, OutcomeReason field, lint/triage implementations, tests, try.go wiring). Bead was decomposed into children rather than implemented.

findings.summary: AC1 unmet: ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime not modified to add PreDispatchLintHook/PostAttemptTriageHook fields; no quality_hooks.go added.
AC2-3 unmet: no insertion of lint hook before Claim or triage hook after outcome adjudication; no integration tests TestLoop_LintHook_FiresPreClaim / TestLoop_TriageHook_FiresPostOutcome.
AC4 unmet: cli/internal/agent/lint_hook.go and triage_hook.go not present in diff.
AC5-7 unmet: warn-only, BLOCK-mode, and fail-open tests absent.
AC8-9 unmet: ExecuteBeadReport.OutcomeReason field not added; shouldSuppressNoProgress not extended for transient reasons.
AC10-11 unmet: cli/cmd/try.go not modified to wire hooks; no TestTry_HooksWired; git grep would find nothing.
AC12 unverifiable: no source changes to compile/test against.

Bead notes indicate this work was decomposed into 5 child beads (ddx-c8dc1146, ddx-d1dae2dd, ddx-68706ef9, ddx-4375292b, ddx-9c81b20f); decomposition was committed separately (6b74a1e2) and is not part of the reviewed diff.
